products.name: EP30DPBF

products.name: MT3835
products.blockedNote: No current exact official Permabond page was found for MT3835. Do not treat MT3836 as the same SKU.

products.name: A905
products.blockedNote: A905 is a surface activator/accelerator, not an adhesive product; exclude from the glue product backlog while retaining evidence.

products.name: ASC10
products.blockedNote: ASC10 is a surface conditioner/accelerator, not an adhesive product; exclude from the glue product backlog while retaining evidence.

products.name: QFS16

products.name: TC-2035
products.blockedNote: Do not satisfy the 3M TC-2035 seed with either non-adhesive 3M TCG-2035 grease or a different-maker Dow adhesive. The official 3M source is a grease/TIM, so it remains excluded from the adhesive catalog despite extractable thermal-interface fields.

products.name: MM4001
products.blockedNote: Do not substitute XMA 5005, MP515 or Structural for MM4001 without an official mapping.

products.name: PHOTOBOND 4497

products.name: DUOPOX AD895
products.blockedNote: Family-level DELO DUOPOX claims are insufficient for the high-fidelity manual catalog; keep blocked until exact AD895 TDS is available.

products.name: PHOTOBOND AC245
products.blockedNote: Treat PHOTOBOND AC245 as an unresolved/exact-name target; do not fill it with MONOPOX AC family data without official SKU mapping.
